name: inn-common-room
summary: The ground floor of a traveler's inn. Dining tables, a hearth, kegs behind a serving counter, staircase to rented rooms above. A warmer, more family-friendly space than a pure tavern.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: squareish with stairs at one end, hearth on a long wall

accent.purpose: worn path from door to stairs

primary_palette.note: hearth-forward — communal long table, family dining vibe
counter-forward — innkeeper takes orders and holds keys at one spot
mixed — hearth plus a pass-through to the kitchen

story_prompts: caravan night — every table full, bard on a chair, innkeeper out of beds
quiet morning — one traveler eating porridge, hearth low, innkeeper on the stairs
blizzard stranding — travelers asleep on benches, children playing by the fire
mysterious guest — hooded figure at a corner table, refusing to sign the register
anti_patterns: stairs can't be buried — keep a clean path from door to stairs
don't pack it like a tavern — inns have fewer tables, more walking space
notice-board near door, not deep in the room — travelers check it on entry
